raw_cv_text:
Alex Rivers
com/in/declanloo/
https://github.com/Declan-Loo
EDUCATION
BSc Computer Science, University College London Sep 2023 – Jun 2026 | London, United Kingdom
Grades: First Class Honours (Year 1 / Year 2)
•
Final Year Project: To develop a system to estimate expected returns by predicting the spread between asset pairs to optimise a
•
portfolio
Committee Member (Route Officer) / Walk Leader for UCL Hiking Club
•
Programming Tutor for UCL Computer Science (Sep 2024 - Apr 2025)
•
EXPERIENCE
Software Engineer Intern - Data, Macquarie Group Jun 2025 – Aug 2025 | London, United Kingdom
Built an end-to-end ETL pipeline for coal market data using Apache Airflow, including database schema creation, REST API data
•
extraction, Pandas transformations, and generated Parquet files using Spark for Amazon S3 storage, automating previous manual
processes, enabling coal traders to query processed data for daily price fluctuation forecasting via Trino.
Developed CI/CD pipeline using Argo Workflows and custom Docker base image to automate Git cloning, unit testing and quality
•
checks, enforcing 80% test coverage and Pylint scores above 8.0, then building and pushing application images to Amazon ECR.
Integrated Bitbucket webhooks to trigger CI/CD pipeline upon pull request merge to development and production branches,
•
reducing deployment time by 30 minutes per release, enabling continuous delivery on Amazon EKS.
Software Engineer Intern, Sunway Group Jun 2024 – Sep 2024 | Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
Developed an automation system using Selenium and Python for web crawling, extracting account information and downloading
•
energy bills for sales galleries, reducing manual processing time by 73%.
Exposed the automation system through authenticated FastAPI endpoints, integrated into daily Google Cloud cron jobs with
•
Cloudflare tunnelling for secure access.
Engineered a PDF extraction process with PyTesseract to retrieve key information from energy bills, storing data in a cloud-based
•
MongoDB database, automating and improving bill monitoring efficiency by 64%.
Packaged the endpoints as LangChain tools for LLM chatbot integration, accelerating data retrieval by 82%.
•
PROJECTS
Community Action Portal, NTT DATA / UCL IXN Oct 2024 – Mar 2025
Collaborated with NTT DATA's open-source sustainability portal, developing a full-stack Android application with Kotlin and a
•
website for users to upload and discover local reports.
Hosted and maintained the Node.js RESTful API server on Azure App Services, with Azure MySQL database, handling report data
•
management and connecting mobile and web platforms.
Deployed a Docker container with GPU acceleration via Nvidia CUDA on Microsoft Azure running Meta Llama 3.2, powering a
•
location-aware chatbot across mobile and web platforms using users' geographical data.
Developed AR experience using ARSceneView and ARCore to display community reports within 15 metres with accurate positioning
•
and proximity-based scaling, improving user experience based on positive feedback.
Student Grade Management System Sep 2024 – Dec 2024
Developed a full-stack student management web application with Spring Boot and H2 database backend, React frontend, and Google
•
Firebase authentication to support university staff access and role-based permissions.
Established MVC architecture with relational database design and unit tests, achieving 100% test coverage across backend components
•
using TDD methodology.
Defined RESTful API controller endpoints with Spring Boot repositories handling CRUD operations for student grades, course
•
registrations, and module management.
EmergencyGo! Feb 2024 – Mar 2024
Developed the 'EmergencyGo' mobile emergency response application with React Native frontend, implementing connectivity to
•
Google Firebase Authentication and Realtime Database for paramedics and doctors.
Configured Realtime Database for live user and casualty data synchronisation leveraging casualty location coordinates and FHIR API
•
during emergencies.
Won UCL Computer Science Society FHIRworks hackathon in collaboration with Great Ormond Street Hospital and Roche.
•
Bio-reactor Vaccine Project Oct 2023 – Dec 2023
Led a cross-disciplinary team of 7 CS and EEE students to develop a feedback mechanism for a real-time bio-reactor control system.
•
Implemented control algorithms achieving ±0.5°C temperature precision, pH 3-7 regulation, and ±20 RPM stirring accuracy with
•
automated sensor processing.
Developed ESP32 connectivity system in C++ using I2C and MQTT protocols for real-time monitoring and remote control.
•
SKILLS
Programming Languages: Python, Java, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL
Framework/Tools: React, Pandas, Git, FastAPI, Selenium, Django, Maven, Spring Boot, Node.js, Docker, Kubernetes
Cloud: Firebase, MongoDB, Google Cloud Platform, Microsoft Azure, Amazon Web Services
name: Alex Rivers
